title: Google seeds Android 17 QPR1 Beta 4 with several bug fixes
description: Google has started rolling out Android 17 QPR1 Beta 4 to eligible Pixel devices. The latest beta arrives nearly three weeks after Beta 3, which was released shortly after The Android Show: I/O Edition 2026. The Android 17 QPR1 Beta 4 update is rolling out to supported Pixel devices starting with the Pixel 6a. Notably, the Pixel 6 and Pixel 6 Pro are absent from the release list and have not received the new build. As for the firmware versions, the Pixel 6a, Pixel 7, and Pixel 7 Pro are receiving build CP31.260522.006.A1, while all other eligible Pixel devices are getting build...

title: Xiaomi Mix Fold 5's key specifications and pricing leak
description: Xiaomi is expected to unveil a successor to the Mix Fold 4 later this year. The upcoming foldable, likely to be called the Mix Fold 5 or Xiaomi 17 Fold, was recently spotted in the Mi Code database. Now, a fresh leak has revealed key specs and pricing of Xiaomi's next-gen foldable phone. Tipster Digital Chat Station shared the new details on Weibo, claiming that Xiaomi's upcoming foldable prototype features a 7.5- to 7.6-inch flexible display with a ‘seamless-crease’ technology. Xiaomi Mix Fold 4 According to the leak, the Xiaomi Mix Fold 5 will pack a battery with a capacity of...

title: The new Tecno Pova 8 boasts an 8,000mAh battery, Alive Matrix Display on its back
description: With the Pova 7, Tecno took a page out of Nothing’s book with the Delta Light Interface, a triangular strip of light with 104 LEDs. Now the company is going to the next level with the Alive Matrix Display. This is a small dot-matrix display in the third “lens” of the camera island (there’s only one actual camera on there, despite appearances). The new Tecno Pova 8 is an upgrade over the Pova 7 in some respects, but a downgrade in others. It has a larger 8,000mAh battery (up from 6,000mAh). TÜV SÜD has tested the phone and found that it lasts 2 days on a single charge. That’s not all – the...

title: vivo X500e's main specs leak
description: vivo is allegedly launching the X500e as part of the X500 family coming this fall. This device will come with the Dimensity 9500 SoC at the helm, a 6.59-inch screen, a 50MP main camera using a 1/1.28" type sensor, a periscope telephoto camera on the rear, and a 7,500 mAh battery. vivo X300 The information comes from Digital Chat Station on Weibo, and according to some of the comments, this device may also be sold as the S60 Pro with similar if not identical specs. The X500e's periscope telephoto camera might be the same 64MP one used in the X500 Pro. The X500 family could launch in...

title: Some Honor Win 2 specs leak again, Honor Win Pad Mini could be on the way too
description: We've already seen the upcoming Honor Win 2's specs leaked not once, but twice, and today the prolific leaker who goes by Digital Chat Station on Weibo is back again with details about the device. According to him, the Win 2 is powered by the Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6 SoC (though it's unclear if it's the 'vanilla' option or the Pro), and has a 10,000 mAh battery with support for wireless charging. Honor Win Its flat screen has "2K" resolution and an "ultra-high" refresh rate, as well as an embedded ultrasonic fingerprint scanner. The phone also comes with a telephoto camera on its...

title: The wide Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 and the Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 receive new certifications
description: Samsung's upcoming wide-format Galaxy Z Fold, most recently believed to be called Galaxy Z Fold8 (while the successor in form to the Galaxy Z Fold7 would be the Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra), has now been certified for sale in India by BIS. It has the model number SM-F971B. The certification doesn't reveal any specs, but according to previous rumors the device will sport a 7.6-inch inner display with a 4:3 aspect ratio, a 50MP main camera, a 50MP ultrawide camera, and a 4,800 mAh battery with support for 45W wired charging. It's expected to weigh around 200g. BIS has also certified the...

title: Google expands Gemini in Chrome to many more countries
description: Google's Gemini in Chrome is now available in many more countries than before. The AI chatbot is now built into the browser on desktop and iOS in Latin America, Africa, and the Middle East. The full list of countries is available here. Unfortunately, the EU still isn't getting it. Maybe later. Gemini in Chrome first launched in the US last year, before expanding to Canada, New Zealand, and India back in March. As the name implies, it's Google's Gemini - but built into Chrome. This means it can easily 'see' your Chrome tabs and windows and help you with what's in...

title: AT&T launches Unlimited Day Pass for iPads
description: Today, AT&T announced Unlimited Day Pass, a new daily plan for iPads with cellular connectivity. It's a no-contract, no-subscription affair - you just pay for a daily pass each day you need it. You get unlimited data for $3 per day. Your first day pass is free courtesy of AT&T (only one per customer). This works by using the eSIM functionality on your cellular-capable iPad. To use Unlimited Day Pass on your iPad with cellular connectivity and eSIM, just go to Settings > Cellular Data, and select the AT&T Unlimited Day Pass. No app or Wi-Fi connection is required. The carrier...

title: Best Buy slashes prices of iPad Air 11 (2025) down to $499
description: If you are looking for an affordable tablet, Best Buy has you covered. Apple and affordability are two words you don't see in one sentence very often, but Best Buy is currently selling the 2025 iPad Air 11 with Apple's M3 chip for as low as $499. That's $250 off the base 128GB configuration with cellular connectivity. The tablet is, of course, unlocked and supports Apple Intelligence. All four color options, Space Gray, Starlight, Purple and Blue, are available at the discounted $499 price. The 256GB, 512GB and 1TB models are also heavily discounted. The 256GB modification is $250...

title: US carriers join forces to fight incidents of copper cable theft, stop disruptions to Internet services
description: The Internet & Television Association in the US posted a worrying report – there were 18,327 incidents of theft and vandalism that affect the network of wires that bring Internet connectivity to customers’ homes. To put that in perspective, this has affected nearly 12 million people. The rate works out to 1,527 incidents per month or 50 incidents on average per day. And it’s getting worse – there has been a 59% increase since 2024. You can read the report here (PDF). Now, the country’s Top 3 carriers – AT&T, T-Mobile and Verizon – have joined the STRIKE initiative. This dramatic acronym...

title: Insta360's answer to DJI's Osmo Pocket 4P is here and it's called the Luna Ultra
description: Insta360 has officially entered the handheld gimbal camera segment with the launch of its new flagship, the Luna Ultra. Co-engineered with Leica, the vlogging-focused camera features a dual-camera setup, which is similar to DJI’s upcoming Osmo Pocket 4P. It sports a primary 1-inch sensor with an f/1.8 aperture and a 20mm equivalent focal length. There’s also a telephoto camera that offers an f/2.0 aperture and a 60mm equivalent focal length with up to 3x optical zoom, 6x lossless zoom, and 12x digital zoom. One of the Luna Ultra's standout features is its detachable 2-inch...

title: European Commission forces Meta to accept third-party chatbots in WhatsApp for free
description: Back in November of last year, Meta banned third-party chatbots in WhatsApp, but of course the company has its own one built right in. The EU authorities have taken issue with this, and the European Commission (EC) specifically has now ordered Meta to restore access to "rival general-purpose AI assistants" in WhatsApp for free, and maintain it until the end of the EC's antitrust investigation into the original move by Meta to ban them. The Commission's press release says this will "prevent serious and irreparable harm to competition in this growing market by Meta's conduct, which at first...

title: Counterpoint: shipments of MediaTek and Qualcomm chipsets decline
description: The skyrocketing costs of memory chips are changing the product mix of smartphone makers – cheaper, lower-margin phones aren’t selling so well, while pricier, high-performance models have bigger margins that helped them to absorb the blow. All of this has had an effect on the chipset market for smartphones, reports Counterpoint. MediaTek remains the largest vendor, though its market share has declined from 38% in Q1 2025 to 32% in Q1 this year. MediaTek’s strong presence in the entry-level and mid-tier segments is being undermined by the reduced smartphone sales in those...

title: Honor Magic V6 review
Wear OS 7 rollout may be around the corner, hints Verizon Pixel Watch support page
description: Google's Wear OS 7 update for Pixel smartwatches could be just around the corner, if recent changes to official Verizon Pixel Watch support pages are any indication. The folks over at Droid-Life spotted the updated support pages for the Pixel Watch 2, Pixel Watch 3, and Pixel Watch 4 on Verizon's website, which confirm the Wear OS 7 update for these smartwatches could be arriving soon. Pixel Watch 4 According to the changelog listed on the support pages, the update will include the June 2026 security patch and carry the version number CP2A.260603.001. Curiously, the pages...

title: New details about Huawei's non-folding wide-screen phone surface
description: A rumor from earlier this year claimed that Huawei was working on a candybar smartphone featuring a 16:9 or 16:10 display, similar in design to the Pura X. A new leak has now revealed additional information about the alleged device. In a now-edited Weibo post, tipster Digital Chat Station shared the key specifications of Huawei's upcoming wide-screen, non-folding smartphone. Huawei Pura X According to the leak, the device will be powered by a Kirin 9-series chipset and could pack a battery with a capacity of 7,000mAh or more. For photography, the handset is tipped to feature a...

title: Honor confirms that the Magic series will get 7 years of OS updates and security patches
description: The Honor Magic V6 began its global rollout last week with a launch in Malaysia and Singapore. Honor says that the new foldable flagship will reach Europe soon. In the meantime, the company wanted to confirm that it and other Magic-series models will receive 7 years of OS updates and security patches in the EU and the UK. This is not a new development – last year the company committed to the 7-year update window for all Magic devices. Meanwhile, more affordable phones like the number series are getting 6 years of support. Honor Magic V6 (in Red) Honor has cool new...

title: The Realme P4R launches with an 8,000mAh battery and an affordable price
description: Back in January, the Realme P4 Power made a splash with its 10,001mAh battery. Since then, there have been multiple P4 models that offered various combinations of battery capacity, chipset performance, camera and display quality. Now there is a brand new member. The Realme P4R has an 8,000mAh battery, the second largest in the series after the P4 Power. It is a Si/C battery with relatively fast 45W charging (including with PPS). Realme advertises that on a single charge, the P4R can last up to 12 hours of gaming, up to 61 hours of calls or up to 169 hours of music playback. The Realme...

title: Xiaomi 17T is now on sale in India
description: The Xiaomi 17T, introduced in India last week, is now available for purchase through Xiaomi's official Indian website, Amazon.in, and Xiaomi retail stores. The Xiaomi 17T comes in violet, blue, and black colors in India with two memory options - 12GB/256GB and 12GB/512GB, priced at INR59,999 ($630/€545) and INR64,999 ($682/€590), respectively. [#InlinePriceWidget,14652,1#] The Xiaomi 17T is powered by the Dimensity 8500 Ultra chip, boots Android 16-based HyperOS 3, and packs a 6.59" 1,268p 120Hz AMOLED display. The smartphone features four cameras - a 32MP selfie camera on the front...

title: OnePlus Turbo 6X and 6X Pro arrive with big batteries and Dimensity 7-series chips
description: The OnePlus Turbo 6X series is now official in China, and they bring sizeable batteries alongside MediaTek 7-series chips and competitive pricing. While they are exclusive to China for the moment, it is highly likely we’ll see them launch globally under the OnePlus Nord lineup. Let’s see what they have on offer. OnePlus Turbo 6x (left) and Turbo 6X Pro (right) OnePlus Turbo 6X Pro gets an 8,000mAh Si-C battery, which supports 80W SuperVOOC fast charging and up to 55W with third-party chargers. Turbo 6X gets a 7,000mAh cell with 45W SuperVOOC speeds. Turbo 6X Pro gets an...
